description: control chart over calibrated detector envelopes: per-detector center line + UCL/LCL at SIGMA_K sigma, 3-sigma-style drift alarm on any breach (the exit code IS the verdict)
rules: read-only over the series; writes only the spc.json chart artifact
a CALIBRATED envelope wins; absent one, the first BASELINE_N points self-calibrate (recorded as source: baseline, honestly distinct)
usage: Set SERIES ({detector: [values]} JSON). Optional ENVELOPE ({detector: {mean, sigma}}), SIGMA_K (default 3), BASELINE_N (default 8). Output: spc.json.
limitation: Breach rule only (points beyond the limits) - no run-rules (trend/oscillation) yet; envelope quality is the caller's calibration.
